scripts.test:e2e:fullstack: bash -c 'set -euo pipefail; uv_bin="${UV_BIN:-uv}"; runs_root=$(mktemp -d); AUTOAD_E2E_RUNS_ROOT="$runs_root" "$uv_bin" run --project .. python e2e/seed_fullstack.py; NO_PROXY=127.0.0.1,localhost no_proxy=127.0.0.1,localhost AUTOAD_E2E_RUNS_ROOT="$runs_root" UV_BIN="$uv_bin" playwright test --config=playwright.fullstack.config.ts'
